title: Our Team
text:
Ivy Hall

President

Ivy is DataSoc’s first president, currently in her third year of studies in Data Science (Concentration in AI, with a minor in Math). She is also an active member of the Carleton U Debate Society. R is her programming language of choice.





Sofia Balaceanu

Vice President Internal

Sofia is a third year student in CAMS (Concetraion in Applied Statistics and Probability, Minor in History), and also volunteers for the Math & Stats Society. R is her favourite programming language.





Tomas McNamer

Tech Lead

Tomas is a third year Math student, and also the president of the Math & Stats Society for the 2025/2026 academic year. Somewhat of a polyglot, he likes Python, Julia and R for data science problems.

title: Blog Posts
text:
Welcome to blog, where members can publish articles about their data science related interests, experiences, or really anything. To submit an post for consideration, please do something.

title: FAQ
text:
TipWho can join DataSoc?





DataSoc is open to all Carleton University students interested in data science, no matter your program.
